title: Refactor Routing Logic
problem_statement: The current routing logic is tightly coupled with PHP and lacks modularity.
risk_if_unaddressed: Continued difficulty in maintaining and scaling the application.
suggested_approach: Refactor routes to use Express.js with TypeScript for better modularity and maintainability.
success_criteria: All routes are defined in Express.js with TypeScript.
Routing logic is decoupled from business logic.
